purpose: Durable P14 aiflow queue for post-P13 convergence, keeping P13 completion evidence machine-checkable while opening the next focused governance batch.

aiflowSubmission.runtimeStatePolicy: .aiflow, .harness, .tmp-test, .trae, coverage.out, bench/current.txt, bench/regression-report.json, bench/summary.md, bin/gofly, and docs/superpowers remain ignored local evidence and must not be committed.
aiflowSubmission.safetyPolicy: P14 tasks are submitted to ignored local aiflow runtime state and mirrored here as durable docs/reference evidence; each task must be completed in order and committed by the current agent or human only after its gate passes or an environment-limited downgrade is documented.

previousBatchHandoff.completionPolicy: P13 is treated as completed only when all twelve task rows in docs/reference/governance-p13-roadmap.json carry commit ids, verification commands, and completion status, and when aiflow status reports no pending or failed runs for that batch.
previousBatchHandoff.runtimeStatePolicy: Local .aiflow queue data is runtime evidence only; durable completion evidence belongs in docs/reference/governance-p13-roadmap.json and docs/reference/governance-boundary-inventory.json.

tasks.title: P13 completion handoff
tasks.objective: Convert P13 from submitted queue evidence into completed durable governance evidence and open P14 as the active aiflow batch.
tasks.deliverable: P13 completed task commits, P14 active roadmap, boundary inventory transition, dashboard convergence fields, and aiflow runtime-state exclusion proof.
tasks.commitPolicy: commit after the P13 completion handoff and P14 active-batch evidence pass boundary inventory and governance report gates without staging ignored runtime state

tasks.title: RPC release-train evidence
tasks.objective: Deepen RPC Tier 1 promotion evidence for release-train, resolver, balancer, stream, deadline, retry, auth, tracing, and allocation criteria without overstating latency parity.
tasks.deliverable: Updated RPC release-train evidence, explicit promoted or held surfaces, allocation-blocking eligibility, latency report-only status, Kitex coexistence notes, and rollback criteria.
tasks.commitPolicy: commit after RPC release-train evidence and benchmark policy gates pass; latency remains report-only unless release-train data is durable

tasks.title: Generator adopter replay evidence
tasks.objective: Deepen goctl-compatible generator maturity with adopter branch replay, classified diffs, temporary project test smoke, and root dependency hygiene.
tasks.deliverable: .api import, format, validation, old/current/future fixture replay, adopter branch replay, classified diff report, generated project go test evidence, and generated-only dependency isolation.
tasks.commitPolicy: commit after generator replay evidence and both generated compatibility gates pass with repeatable diffs and clean root module dependency boundaries
